subcodes.first_line: O Qasim! He Who is encompassed by sorrows, through that which the hands of them that have disbelieved in thy Lord have wrought, maketh mention of thee at this hour [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا قاسم یذکرک فی هذالحین من احاطته الاحزان بما اکتسبت ایدی الذین کفروا بربک
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering and imprisonment, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
